secrets.name: GHOST_KEY
secrets.description: Read key for the Ghost Blog Service

scripts.build: cd ./workspace/link-scanner && npm install --include=dev && npm run build

tasks.name: link-scanner-watchdog
tasks.prompt: Watchdog check: run `curl -sf http://localhost:3000/health` to test if the link-scanner API is up. If it fails or times out, run `cd /home/node/clawd/workspace/link-scanner && ./node_modules/.bin/pm2 resurrect || ./node_modules/.bin/pm2 start ecosystem.config.js` to bring it back, then verify with another curl. Reply with a single short status line: OK or RESTARTED or FAILED.

tasks.name: link-scanner-full-scan
tasks.prompt: Trigger a full link scan by running: `curl -sf -X POST http://localhost:3000/scan/trigger`. Report the scan_id from the response and confirm it started.
